## PR Title Convention
Use this format:
`type: description`

Examples:
- `docs: refine fundamentals chat contract`
- `feat: add runtime checkpoint recovery`

## Summary
- What changed?
- Why was this needed?

## Checklist
- [ ] tests added/updated (or N/A with reason)
- [ ] security impact reviewed
- [ ] docs updated
- [ ] `pnpm check` passes locally

## Validation
- Commands run:
- Key outputs/results:
- Latency evidence artifact path (if queue-latency changed):
- Latency evidence validator command (if applicable): `node scripts/validate-latency-evidence.mjs <artifact-path>`

## Related
- Issue/Thread/PR:
- Follow-up work (if any):
